name: Keras, Disgraced Werewolf
description:
“Avert your gaze.”

Unlike their lesser counterparts, a great werewolf can’t hide their canine characteristics. This problem leads them to form packs, in which the lesser werewolves are sent out for any of the greater one’s needs.

Keras, recently usurped from her place as pack leader, (By none other than her right-hand man) no longer has these luxuries. Out in the open, she risks breaking werewolf code—revealing herself to humans.

She cannot afford to be seen.
creator: GrailofHell
